evidence_summary: APSB25-94 style incident: bl observe output includes PHP process tree with suspicious --allow-url-fopen flag, ModSec audit log with two rule 941160 hits (HTML injection) originating from the same referrer, and journalctl showing an OOMKill event on the httpd service at 04:28 UTC. The operator requests a unified timeline correlating these three streams to confirm exploitation sequence.
